buyer_seat.description: Capital allocator tied to Angola sovereign balance sheet or strategic AI capital, funding the $100M unlock before hyperscaler entry
buyer_seat.authority_type: Sovereign-linked strategic allocator with pre-FID mandate authority

authority.notes: Sovereign-linked allocator seat identified; final sign-off path still committee-influenced.

capital_control.notes: Mandate economics are defined, but full orchestrator-led stack still being assembled.

mandate_alignment.notes: AI campus pre-hyperscaler unlock is strategic but requires explicit mandate framing.

urgency_pressure.notes: Window is before hyperscaler entry; delay weakens positioning and economics.

risk_perception.notes: Perceived execution risk remains until orchestrator bench + stack credibility are locked.

trust_access.notes: Alpha Wave path exists via Wade; additional orchestrator paths still need direct mapping.

decision_clarity.notes: Mandate ask is explicit: approve $8M–$25M mandate structure for $100M unlock path.

pressure_driver.description: Pre-hyperscaler capital window requires mandate commitment now to preserve first-mover position.

dependency_risk.notes: Alpha Wave relationship is covered; non-Alpha orchestrator access still needs expansion.

next_action: Map and activate direct/credible paths to Temasek, KKR, Stonepeak, GIP, and General Atlantic to diversify orchestrator access beyond Alpha Wave.

intelligence_tasks.task: Build named connection map + intro pathways for Temasek, KKR, Stonepeak, GIP, and General Atlantic (excluding Alpha Wave).
Translate orchestrator bench into staged capital stack with accountable owner and timeline for the $100M unlock step.
